race.comment: ARADEO (8) ran well in what looks a better maiden on debut at Sale, settling back but finding the line strongly to grab third, beaten 1.75 lengths. Out to 1200m here and with natural improvement she'll go close. HINEY'S BAR (4) ran well on debut last start to finish third over 1100m at Colac and will have taken plenty from that. He could push forward and take catching. WILD ROSES GROW (11) ran well last time at Kilmore and any further improvement on that has her fighting out the finish again. CORRO (3) was poor first up in a stronger maiden without the best of runs. He's lightly raced and can improve quickly.
